title: nephelium cuspidatum subvar. dasyneurum
intro: Nephelium cuspidatum subvar. dasyneurum, also known as the Rambai fruit, is a species of plant in the Sapindaceae family. This plant is native to Malaysia and is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Nephelium cuspidatum subvar. dasyneurum include reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting digestive health. The plant can be prepared as a tincture, infusion, or decoction, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
